description: The 22 sacred letters of heaven from the Alphabet of Baba Johani

entries.text: Today we begin to learn the language of grace — Shona. Every letter is a small light. When we speak it kindly, the light grows. Each sound is a small seed. When you speak it with kindness, it grows into a tree of peace.
A – 'Ah' — Meaning: One God, strength, beginning. Say: A se Mwari — God is one. Picture: Like the sun rising for the first time.
BA – 'Bah' — Meaning: The body, the house that holds life. Say: Ba se muviri — my body is God's home.
KA – 'Kah' — Meaning: The child, the breath between father and mother. Say: Ka se mwana — a child brings joy.
RA – 'Rah' — Meaning: The sun, light, warmth. Say: Ra se zuva — the sun gives life.
MA – 'Mah' — Meaning: The moon, gentle rest. Say: Ma se mwedzi — the moon watches at night.
DA – 'Dah' — Meaning: Love. Say: Da se rudo — I love, therefore I shine.
NA – 'Nah' — Meaning: Connection, togetherness. Say: Na se isu — we are together.
SA – 'Sah' — Meaning: Likeness, harmony. Say: Sa se kubatana — to be like one another.
ZI – 'Zee' — Meaning: Silence, peace. Say: Zi se kunyarara — quiet brings wisdom.
TA – 'Tah' — Meaning: We are, unity of people. Say: Ta se tiri — we exist together.
VA – 'Vah' — Meaning: They are, the many, our neighbours. Say: Va se vose — they are all my friends. Picture: People holding hands in a big circle.
NGU – 'Ng-goo' — Meaning: Time, moments that move like wind. Say: Ngu se nguva — time helps things grow. Picture: The sun climbing from morning to night.
NDA – 'Ndah' — Meaning: I am, being alive. Say: Nda se ndiri — I am here and happy. Picture: A child placing a hand on the chest, smiling.
PA – 'Pah' — Meaning: Giving, sharing. Say: Pa se kupa — I give with joy. Picture: Two children sharing fruit.
HA – 'Hah' — Meaning: Won't, gentle strength to say no to wrong. Say: Ha se handiite — I will not do harm. Picture: A child shaking the head kindly.
GA – 'Gah' — Meaning: To instil, to plant good habits. Say: Ga se kurima — plant kindness every day. Picture: Planting a seed that becomes a tree.
SHU – 'Shoo' — Meaning: Wind, spirit moving. Say: Shu se mhepo — the wind brings cool air. Picture: Leaves dancing in a soft breeze.
MBA – 'Mbah' — Meaning: House, home, family. Say: Mba se imba yangu — my house is full of love. Picture: A small hut with smoke rising gently.
NYU – 'Nyoo' — Meaning: Water, life and freshness. Say: Nyu se mvura — water makes the garden happy. Picture: Rain falling on green plants.
CHI – 'Chee' — Meaning: What, question, learning. Say: Chi se chii? — what is that? let's learn! Picture: A child pointing and smiling with curiosity.
TO – 'Toh' — Meaning: Judges, air, breath of fairness. Say: To se kutonga zvakanaka — judge kindly. Picture: Two friends settling a game with fairness.
NGA – 'Ngah' — Meaning: Heaven, crown, completion. Say: NGA se denga — heaven is bright above us. Picture: A crown of light shining in the sky.

THE 22 LETTERS OF HEAVEN: A (One God), BA (Body), KA (Child), RA (Sun), MA (Moon), DA (Love), NA (Connection), SA (Likeness), ZI (Silence), TA (Unity), VA (Neighbours), NGU (Time), NDA (I am), PA (Giving), HA (Won't), GA (Plant), SHU (Wind), MBA (House), NYU (Water), CHI (Question), TO (Judges), NGA (Heaven). Every time you speak them kindly, you build peace inside your heart and inside your home.
